---
name: Feature request
about: A new capability or an improvement
title: ""
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that the tool doesn't let you do today? Describe the
need, not a pre-decided solution.

## Proposed direction

How you imagine it working. If it touches vocabulary or output strings, note
whether it belongs in `cue_words/<lang>.json`, the book YAML, or
`templates/base.yaml` (see [CONTRIBUTING](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)).

## Scope

- [ ] Adding a language (`cue_words/<lang>.json`)
- [ ] Adding / adapting a page template (`templates/base.yaml`)
- [ ] Pipeline behavior
- [ ] Other

## Alternatives considered

Anything you ruled out, and why.
